title: SCP-3199, Humans Refuted
description: An unknown creature that is almost impossible to stop due to its egg production
body:
Humans Refuted adds a new monster. Its history comes from the SCP universe, where it is referred to as SCP-3199, also known as Humans Refuted.


These large humanoid creatures attack all animals, inflicting Poison and Nausea with their deadly bite. SCP-3199 can lay down eggs. When killed, there is a 90% chance it will lay an egg, and if it kills something, there’s a 20% chance it will lay one as well. These eggs are incredibly tough and after three minutes, the egg will hatch, bringing a new SCP-3199 into the world. 

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► Where does SCP-3199 spawn?

SCP-3199 can spawn anywhere in the overworld like a normal monster.

► How can I stop SCP-3199 Eggs hatching?

To prevent new SCP-3199 instances from hatching, SCP-3199 eggs can be placed in water to prevent them from hatching.

</details>



![SCP-3199](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/deff484ca7cd359086a5f85237e1ea2e76af5168.png)

SCP-3199 are large humanoid entities that attack both animals and players. When SCP-3199 attacks, its victim is inflicted with Poison and Nausea effects. SCP-3199 are strong, fast, and dangerous, though they are slower in water. If SCP-3199 kills an entity, it has a 20% chance to spawn an egg. However, if SCP-3199 dies, it has a 90% chance to spawn an egg.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
